_meta.note: Active listing robust mean (Browse API FIXED_PRICE). No sold data. Prices normalized to USD. Includes market stability CV (sd/mean). Ungraded restricted to Near Mint or Better / Excellent. Includes avg days-on-market for active listings (listing age). Base prices stored in dedicated ebay-base-prices.json (FIX #3).

daysOnMarket.meaning: Average age of ACTIVE listings (not time-to-sell). Falls back to item detail fetch if summary omits creation date.
